switch.title: One-click and scheduled automatic cleanup of run file classification
switch.get: if grep "clearbox_auto_file_all=1" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then echo 1 else echo 0 fi
switch.set: if grep "clearbox_auto_file_all=0" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then sed -i 's/clearbox_auto_file_all=0/clearbox_auto_file_all=1/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » It's turned on!" else sed -i 's/clearbox_auto_file_all=1/clearbox_auto_file_all=0/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » Closed!" fi

switch.title: Fast disk optimization during one-click/scheduled automatic cleaning
switch.get: if grep "clearbox_auto_fast_gc=1" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then echo 1 else echo 0 fi
switch.set: if grep "clearbox_auto_fast_gc=0" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then sed -i 's/clearbox_auto_fast_gc=0/clearbox_auto_fast_gc=1/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » Enabled!" else sed -i 's/clearbox_auto_fast_gc=1/clearbox_auto_fast_gc=0/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » Disabled!" fi

summary.sh: echo -n 'Current set size:'; echo -n $(cat $work_dir/settings.prop | grep clearbox_clear_cache_size | cut -f2 -d '='); echo -n ' M'

param.name: put
param.desc: Please enter a new value [number]: (Unit: MB. Range: 100M)
param.label: number
